title: China Hat
description: Stylish Asian conical hat decoration above players' heads.
body:
> ChinaHat adds a stylish Asian conical hat above players' heads.
>
> This purely cosmetic mod renders a beautiful cone-shaped _Chinese Hat_ decoration floating above players in your world. The hat features gradient shading, optional outlines, and smooth visual effects that make it stand out without affecting gameplay.
>
> Highly configurable: adjust colors (RGB + alpha), size (radius and height), position offset, and choose whether to display the hat on yourself, other players, or both. The hat automatically hides during swimming, flying with elytra, or crawling to maintain visual consistency.
>
> Perfect for adding a unique visual flair to multiplayer servers or personal gameplay!
